title: Count Sorted Vowel Strings
titleCn: 统计字典序元音字符串的数目

testcases.input: n = 1 Output: 5 Explanation: The 5 sorted strings that consist of vowels only are ["a","e","i","o","u"].
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The 5 sorted strings that consist of vowels only are ["a","e","i","o","u"].

testcases.input: n = 2 Output: 15 Explanation: The 15 sorted strings that consist of vowels only are ["aa","ae","ai","ao","au","ee","ei","eo","eu","ii","io","iu","oo","ou","uu"]. Note that "ea" is not a valid string since 'e' comes after 'a' in the alphabet.
testcases.expectedOutput: 15 Explanation: The 15 sorted strings that consist of vowels only are ["aa","ae","ai","ao","au","ee","ei","eo","eu","ii","io","iu","oo","ou","uu"]. Note that "ea" is not a valid string since 'e' comes after 'a' in the alphabet.
